data.content:
Here are the **static dependencies** hidden inside the lambdas in `ReportGenerator.cs`:

| Line | Static Call | Testability Issue |
|------|-------------|-------------------|
| 8 | `File.Exists(path)` | Requires real filesystem |
| 9 | `DateTime.UtcNow` | Non-deterministic time |
| 9 | `File.ReadAllText(path)` | Requires real filesystem |
| 17 | `File.WriteAllText(...)` | Writes to filesystem |
| 17 | `DateTime.Now` | Non-deterministic time |
| 18 | `Console.WriteLine(...)` | Side effect |
| 18 | `DateTime.UtcNow` | Non-deterministic time |
| 19 | `Environment.SetEnvironmentVariable(...)` | Global state mutation |
| 19 | `DateTime.UtcNow` | Non-deterministic time |
| 27 | `Directory.GetFiles(...)` | Requires real filesystem |
| 28 | `DateTime.UtcNow` | Non-deterministic time |
| 29 | `File.ReadAllText(f)` | Requires real filesystem |
| 30 | `Environment.MachineName` | Machine-specific |

**Summary:** The lambdas/LINQ hide 5 `DateTime` calls, 5 `File`/`Directory` calls, 2 `Environment` calls, and 1 `Console` call — all untestable without wrapping behind abstractions (e.g., `IFileSystem`, `ITimeProvider`).
